messages.content: # Want to save your replays with good quality and good length? Follow this guide!

## Please follow the below steps very carefully as without them, the full run may not be all recorded.

> Open Content Manager and go to Settings > Content Manager > Replays > AC Settings > Maximum Size: [click on the number] > 8000
> This will allow the replays to be 8000 MB in size.
> Content Manager > Settings > Content Manager > Replays > Replays Autosave > Tick Autosave Replay

# What to do after completing your run

> After you finish your run, leave the game.
> A pop-up will appear in Content Manager showing the leaderboard positions and it will have a button that says replay. Hit the arrow next to it and press save replay.

# Sending the run

> Go to https://drive.google.com/drive/home and log into your google account.
> Click on New in the top left and click "New folder" and name it whatever you want.
> Open the folder (It may do it automatically)
> Click new and then file upload and head to C:\Users\[User]\Documents\Assetto Corsa\replay and find the specific replay of your run and double click on it.
> In the bottom, right it will say it is uploading. THIS WILL TAKE A WHILE DEPENDING ON THE FILE SIZE
> After it has uploaded, click the three dots on the right, share then copy link.
# BE SURE TO TURN ALL THESE SETTINGS TO MAX FOR THE MAXIMUM REPLAY SIZE AND QUALITY
